case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS FIELDS, EVELYN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIELDS, EVELYN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.50, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR.
